name: projeto-bd-loja-materiais
description: Arquitetura separada para a Entrega 03 do projeto de Banco de Dados 2026.1.

scripts.dev: dotenv -e .env -- cross-env FRONTEND_ORIGIN=http://localhost:5173,http://127.0.0.1:5173 VITE_API_URL=http://localhost:8080/api concurrently -k -n backend,frontend ".\apps\backend\mvnw.cmd -f .\apps\backend\pom.xml spring-boot:run" "npm --prefix apps/frontend run dev -- --host localhost --port 5173"
